title: 0Skill Cobblemon Edition
description: The official Modpack for the 0Skill Community Cobblemon (Fabric) Server!
body:
# 0Skill Modpack

Enhance your **Cobblemon** experience with the *0Skill Modpack - Cobblemon Edition*. This collection is intricately designed to elevate your adventure with a variety of mods and add-ons.

## Cobblemon Features / Add-on's

- **Transportation**: Ride your Pokémon with *Cobblemounts* by alphaproject217.
- **Breeding**: Breed your Cobblemon with the *Cobbreeding Mod* by alphaproject217.
- **Myths and Legends**: Encounter legendary and mythical Pokémon with the "Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon" by D0ctorLeon.
- **Cobblemon Interface**: Enjoy a Pokémon-inspired menu theme with sounds through the *Cobblemon Interface* by VinnyStalck
- **Cardboard Cutout Mon**: Adds more distinct placeholder images to all of the un-modeled pokémon in Cobblemon.

## Visual and HUD Enhancements

- **AppleSkin**: Revamps the food and hunger HUD.
- **Better Third Person**: Refines third person camera mechanics.
- **BetterF3**: Introduces a customizable, readable debug HUD.
- **Cull Less Leaves**: Improves the aesthetics of leaves.
- **Dynamic Crosshair**: Contextually alters the crosshair.
- **Enhanced Attack Indicator**: Expands the use of the attack indicator.
- **FancyMenu**: Personalizes menu screens with animations.
- **Item Highlighter**: Emphasizes newly acquired items.
- **Round Trees**: Transforms tree leaves to a rounded appearance.
- **ToolTipFix**: Keeps tooltips within screen bounds.

## Shaders and Lighting

- **AstraLex Shaders**: A highly adaptable shaderpack.
- **BSL Shaders**: A versatile and optimized shaderpack.
- **Complementary Shaders**: Offers variants for quality or performance balance.
- **Kappa Shader**: Delivers high-quality, realistic, and stylized visuals.
- **Nostalgia Shader**: Gives a stylized, modern touch to Minecraft.
- **Solas Shader**: Introduces a fantasy style with colored lighting.
- **Super Duper Vanilla**: Mimics the style of the cancelled Super Duper Graphics Pack.

## Audio and Sound

- **Audio Extension for FancyMenu**: Incorporates audio into menu interfaces.
- **Auudio**: A mod for background sound management.
- **Presence Footsteps**: Adds intricate footstep sounds for realism.

## Gameplay and Mechanics

- **Better End Sky**: Client-side rendering of the Better End mod's sky.
- **CleanCut**: Enables fighting through visual obstructions.
- **ClearDespawn**: Items flash before despawning, for better visibility.
- **Cloth Config API**: A library mod for easy mod configuration.
- **Crafting Tweaks**: Enhance crafting with matrix rotation and cleaning.
- **Ctrl Q**: Quick stack dropping with "CTRL+Q".
- **Dynamic FPS**: Boosts performance when the game runs in the background.
- **Mouse Wheelie**: Streamlines item scrolling and inventory management.
- **Tree Harvester**: Simplifies tree harvesting with rapid leaf decay.

## User Interface (UI)

- **AdvancementInfo**: Details advancement requirements.
- **Better Ping Display [Fabric]**: Shows numerical ping values.
- **Better Statistics Screen**: Enhanced statistics overview.
- **Borderless Mining**: Implements borderless windowed mode for the game.
- **Cherished Worlds**: Allows you to favorite and pin worlds.
- **CraftPresence**: Customizes how you appear on Discord.
- **Mod Menu**: Lists and provides details on installed mods.
- **Roughly Enough Items (REI)**: A mod for browsing items and recipes.

## World and Environment

- **BedrockIfy**: Brings Bedrock edition features to Java.
- **Cave Dust**: Creates dust particle effects in caves.
- **Falling Leaves**: Adds a natural touch with falling leaf particles.
- **Fabric Seasons**: Introduces season changes to the game environment.

## Compatibility

Designed for the **0Skill Cobblemon Server**, the modpack also supports a rich single-player experience.

Dive into an optimized Cobblemon world, tailored for both the server adventurer and the solitary player.

## Full Mod List

- [**Accelerated Decay**](https://modrinth.com/mod/accelerated-decay) - Speeds up the leaf decaying process
- [**Additional Cobblemon Spawn Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-cobblemon-spawn-compat) - This pack adds Cobblemon spawn compatibility for biome mods that aren't fully compatible. Biomes without tags intended for Cobblemon have been added for consistency. Added modded biome spawns to Mons that fit the area, but wouldn't spawn without defining.
- [**AdvancementInfo**](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo) - Show more information about advancement requirements
- [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements
- [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods.
- [**AstraLex Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralex) - Shaderpack with very high customization. If you like effects, this shaderpack is made for you!
- [**Audio Extension for FancyMenu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/audio-extension-for-fancymenu) - Add audio elements to FancyMenu layouts.
- [**Auudio**](https://modrinth.com/mod/auudio) - Library mod to easily play background sound in menus and worlds.
- [**BCLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bclib) - A Library Mod for the BetterX Team
- [**BSL Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bsl-shaders) - Shaderpack for Minecraft: Java Edition. It's bright, colorful, and distinct.
- [**Bad Wither No Cookie - Reloaded**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bad-wither-no-cookie) - Localizes the wither and dragon death sounds.
- [**Balm**](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - Abstraction Layer (but not really)™ for Blay's multiplatform mods
- [**Beautify: Refabricated**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated) - Adds lots of vanilla-styled ways to spice up your builds.
- [**BedrockIfy**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockify) - BedrockIfy is a fabric Minecraft Mod that implements some useful Minecraft Bedrock Edition features into Minecraft Java Edition.
- [**Better End Sky**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-end-sky) - Ripoff of the Better End mod's sky renderer in a standalone mod for a client-side only usage.
- [**Better Ping Display [Fabric]**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list
- [**Better Statistics Screen**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful.
- [**Better Than Mending**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-than-mending) -  A small quality of life tweak to the Mending enchantment 
- [**Better Third Person**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) - Improves third person camera view.
- [**BetterEnd**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) - New Biomes, mysterious rituals and Mobs for your End
- [**BetterF3**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.
- [**BetterNether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) - More Biomes, More Mobs, More Tools for the fiery Dimension
- [**Blossom**](https://modrinth.com/mod/blossom) - Apples blossom upon leaves by the pollen from bees!
- [**Bookshelf**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) - An open source library for other mods!
- [**Borderless Mining**](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Changes Fullscreen to use a borderless window.
- [**Botanimon - Botany Pots for Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botanimon-botany-pots-for-cobblemon) - Use Cobblemon crops (apricorns, berries, roots, herbs,etc) with Botany Pots
- [**Botany Pots**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) - Adds pots that you can use to grow crops!
- [**Botanypots & Cobblemon berries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botanypots-cobblemon-berries) - As the title suggests this datapack is designed to allow berries from Cobblemon to be compatible with the Botanypots mod! Happy farming!
- [**CIT Resewn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs)
- [**Capes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods
- [**Cave Dust**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) - Dust is a Minecraft mod that adds the white ash particle from the Basalt Deltas biome to the underground to simulate dust!
- [**Chat Patches**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches) - A Minecraft Fabric client-side mod that touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible!
- [**Cherished Worlds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - Favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds, which will always be at the top of the list and cannot be deleted.
- [**CleanCut**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cleancut) - Fight enemies back through grass and other similar obstructions!
- [**ClearDespawn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cleardespawn) - Make items blink when they're about to despawn
- [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [**Clumps**](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag
- [**Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - A Pokémon mod for Fabric and Forge
- [**Cobblemon Emissive Ores**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-emissive-ores) - Makes Cobblemon ores emit light.
- [**Cobblemon Interface**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-interface) - A Cobblemon inspired GUI Textures and Sounds
- [**Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-addon) - The 'Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon' for Cobblemon Mod introduces key items and new spawning conditions, intended to add encounters with Legendary and Mythical Pokémon, along with pre-made spawns for select key items.
- [**Cobblemon Shiny Effects**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shiny-effects) - A datapack addon for the Cobblemon mod that gives visual and auditory cues for shiny pokemon.
- [**Cobblemon: Fortune-able Evo Stones**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fortune-able-evo-stones) - Standalone release of a Cobblemon: Gear Shift tweak that allows Evolution Stones from Cobblemon to be mined with Fortune.
- [**CobblemonExtras**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonextras) - A sidemod for Cobblemon, adding support for additional server side commands such as poketrade, pokeshout, pokesee, and more!
- [**CobblemonLoot**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonloot) - Data pack for Cobblemon.

Adds some Cobblemon items to vanilla chest loot tables.
- [**Cobblemounts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemounts) - Cobblemounts is a side-mod for Cobblemon that lets you mount Pokemon and use them to fly, swim, and travel.
- [**Cobbreeding**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding) - A side-mod for Cobblemon to add Pokémon breeding early.
- [**Collective**](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) - 🎓 Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods.
- [**Complementary Shaders - Reimagined**](https://modrinth.com/mod/complementary-reimagined) - Exceptional quality, detail and performance; while preserving the unique visuals of Minecraft.
- [**Complementary Shaders - Unbound**](https://modrinth.com/mod/complementary-unbound) - Exceptional quality, detail and performance; while pushing the limits of Minecraft.
- [**Continents**](https://modrinth.com/mod/continents) - Continents is a small add-on mod to reshape the world so that landmasses are further apart, varying in size and shape.
- [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures
- [**Couplings**](https://modrinth.com/mod/couplings) - Coupled usage of doors, fence gates, and trapdoors
- [**CraftPresence**](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftpresence) - Completely Customize the way others see you play in Discord!
- [**Crafting Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks) - Allows you to rotate, balance or clear the crafting matrix by the press of a button, in any (supported) crafting window.
- [**Crawl**](https://modrinth.com/mod/crawl) - Allows you to crawl
- [**Create Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Building Tools and Aesthetic Technology
- [**Create Fabric Sodium Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric-sodium-fix) - A fork of Create Fabric that supports Sodium 0.5+
- [**Create Support for Open Parties and Claims**](https://modrinth.com/mod/opac-fabric-create-support) - Adds Fabric Create mod support to Open Parties and Claims
- [**Ctrl Q**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctrl-q) - This mod forces "CTRL+Q" to be used to drop a stack of item
- [**Cull Less Leaves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) - Cull leaves while looking hot!
- [**Disable Custom Worlds Advice**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcwa) - Minecraft asking you if you want to load a custom world is annoying. Let's fix it!
- [**Dismount Entity**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dismount-entity) - 🚏 Allows players to dismount/remove/exit entities/mobs from mounted entities without breaking them.
- [**Drip Sounds (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric) - Adds sounds for drip particles landing
- [**Dynamic Crosshair**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - A mod that hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context
- [**Dynamic FPS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Improve performance when Minecraft is in the background.
- [**Enchantment Descriptions**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - Provides a way to get enchantment descriptions from enchanted books.
- [**Enhanced Attack Indicator**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-attack-indicator) - Uses the attack indicator for more than just melee attacks 
- [**Entity Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible
- [**Extended Drawers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) - Adds drawers and more
- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain.
- [**Fabric Language Kotlin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
- [**Fabric Seasons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons) - A simple mod that adds seasons to the game, dynamically changing biomes as you play.
- [**Fabric Seasons: Terralith Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons-terralith-compat) - Terralith compatibility for Fabric Seasons
- [**Falling Leaves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks
- [**FancyMenu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) - Minecraft menus, but much more fancy! Customize menu screens with animations, buttons, texts, images and more!
- [**FastAnim**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastanim) - Speeds up entity animation calculations!
- [**Fastload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) - Modifies how worlds are loaded to speed up loading times.
- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [**FeyTweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/feytweaks) - Mod for optimizing signs and beacons.
- [**Forge Config API Port**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Forge's whole config system provided to the Fabric ecosystem. Designed for a multiloader architecture.
- [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geophilic) - A subtle overhaul of vanilla Overworld biomes
- [**Highlight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight) - Highlight changes the visualization of specific blocks in the game to have more aligned selections to their models.
- [**Iceberg**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg) - A modding library that contains new events, helpers, and utilities to make modder's lives easier.
- [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
- [**Immersive Portals**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) - See through portals and teleport seamlessly
- [**Indium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo
- [**InvMove**](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - Forge/Fabric/Quilt mod that adds the ability to walk around while in inventories
- [**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs
- [**Item Highlighter**](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter) - Highlights newly picked-up items. Simple and convenient.
- [**Kappa Shader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/kappa-shader) - A high-quality realistic, yet also somewhat stylized shaderpack.
- [**Konkrete**](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) - Just another boring library mod.
- [**Krypton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
- [**LambDynamicLights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - A dynamic lights mod for Fabric.
- [**Language Reload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
- [**LazyDFU**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization
- [**Ledger**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ledger) - A serverside logging mod
- [**Let Me Despawn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lmd) - Improves performance by tweaking mob despawn rules. Say bye to pesky unintentional persistent mobs.
- [**Linkart**](https://modrinth.com/mod/linkart) - Linkart allows you to link your carts together via chains
- [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod
- [**Load My Resources**](https://modrinth.com/mod/load-my-resources) - Load resources on game start, like a resource pack, but enabled by default.
- [**Longer Chat History**](https://modrinth.com/mod/longer-chat-history) - Makes chat history much longer
- [**MacOS Input Fixes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/macos-input-fixes) - This mod fixes many Minecraft macOS input bugs. It makes scrolling with shift work properly on macOS, left click + control = left click (instead of right click) and more fixes!
- [**Make Bubbles Pop**](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) - Client-side mod that makes bubble particles pop and lets them rise realistically to the water surface.
- [**Memory Leak Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server
- [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
- [**Monsters in the Closet**](https://modrinth.com/mod/monsters-in-the-closet) - Highlights the mobs that are preventing you from sleeping
- [**Moonlight Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) - dynamic data pack and registration, villager activities, custom map marker and a lot more
- [**More Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance
- [**More Mob Variants**](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) - Adds new variants to existing mobs.
- [**Motschen's Better Leaves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-leaves) - Makes the leaves bushy, while being compatible with other resourcepacks and mods.
- [**Mouse Wheelie**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie) - A "small" clientside mod featuring item scrolling, inventory sorting, item refilling and more!
- [**Nature's Compass**](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass) - Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world.
- [**NetherPortalFix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherportalfix) - Ensures correct destinations when travelling back and forth through Nether Portals in Multiplayer.
- [**No Chat Reports**](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Makes chat unreportable (where possible)
- [**Nostalgia Shader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgia-shader) - Capturing the essence of old shaderpacks to create a stylized and modern Minecraft-look.
- [**Not Enough Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person
- [**Open Parties and Claims**](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) - Adds the ability to claim chunks and make player parties, integrates with Xaero's Minimap and World Map
- [**Presence Footsteps**](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - ..An Overly complicated Sound Mod...
- [**Puzzles Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Why's it called Puzzles you ask? That's the puzzle!
- [**Reese's Sodium Options**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
- [**Remove Terralith Intro Message**](https://modrinth.com/mod/remove-terralith-intro-message) - A datapack/mod to remove the intro message that appears with Terralith.
- [**Roughly Enough Items (REI)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - Clean and Customizable. Alternative to Just Enough Items/JEI.
- [**Roughly Enough Professions (REP)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-professions-rep) - An REI addon that adds profession workstations
- [**Roughly Searchable**](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-searchable) - Highlights items that match the current search in REI
- [**Round Trees**](https://modrinth.com/mod/round-trees) - Trees are round in real life, why aren't they in Minecraft?
- [**Show Me Your Skin!**](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) - A mod to hide or customize armor rendering. 
- [**Shulker Box Tooltip**](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory
- [**Smarter Farmers (farmers replant)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smarter-farmers-farmers-replant) - Allows villagers to replant the correct seed & allows them to use modded ones
- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance
- [**Sodium Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
- [**Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks) - Reintroduces vanilla-like smooth lighting to non-full blocks (e.g. dirt paths and how they have dark shading when directly next to a full block) when using Sodium. 
- [**Soft Voxels Lite**](https://modrinth.com/mod/soft-voxels-lite) - A minimalistic and performant path-traced shaderpack.
- [**Solas Shader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/solas-shader) - A good performing fantasy stylised shaderpack with colored lighting and fancy volumetrics
- [**Spawn Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-animations) - Hostile mobs dig out of the ground or poof into existence when they spawn!
- [**Starlight (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors
- [**Stendhal**](https://modrinth.com/mod/stendhal) - Stendhal is a client-side Fabric mod offering new and enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat.
- [**Stoneworks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) - Vanilla stone types in plenty of variations for all your building needs.
- [**Super Duper Vanilla**](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-duper-vanilla) - A shader pack created to convey the style of the cancelled Super Duper Graphics Pack and other popular Minecraft titles.
- [**Superflat World No Slimes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/superflat-world-no-slimes) - 🙅 Removes those pesky slimes when you're trying to be creative in a superflat world.
- [**Supplementaries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Vanilla+ additions: Jars, signposts, faucets, weather vanes spring launchers, sconces, planters, lights, decoration and automation
- [**Supplementaries Squared**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared) - The extra content of Supplementaries that doesn't necessarily fit in the base mod!
- [**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - Terralith takes Minecraft's 1.18 massive world generation overhaul, and turns it up to eleven.
- [**ThreadTweak**](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) - Improve and tweak Minecraft thread scheduling. Fork of Smooth Boot for ≥1.20
- [**Title Fixer**](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fixer) - Simple client side mod that makes titles displayed on-screen always fit inside the screen space.
- [**Tool Stats**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tool-stats) - Provides additional tooltip info for items
- [**ToolTipFix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) - Fixes Tooltips from runnning off the screen.
- [**Tree Harvester**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester) - 🌲 Harvest full trees and huge mushrooms instantly with an axe. Includes fast leaf decay and sapling placement.
- [**Unique Enchanted Books**](https://modrinth.com/mod/unique-enchanted-books) - A pack that gives each enchanted book different textures.
- [**Visuality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.
- [**Wavey Capes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes) - The cape shouldn't be a static slab
- [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked.
- [**Xaero's World Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap.
- [**XaerosCobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeroscobblemon) - Adds Pokémon icons to Xaero's Minimap
- [**XaerosShinyCobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaerosshinycobblemon) - XaerosCobblemon but shiny
- [**YUNG's API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api) - Library mod for YUNG's mods.
- [**YUNG's Better Desert Temples**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's desert temples!
- [**YUNG's Better Dungeons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's dungeons!
- [**YUNG's Better End Island**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island) - An overhaul of the main End Island where the dragon fight takes place!
- [**YUNG's Better Jungle Temples**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's jungle temples!
- [**YUNG's Better Mineshafts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts) - A long-awaited and much-needed abandoned mineshaft overhaul!
- [**YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's Nether fortresses!
- [**YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's ocean monuments!
- [**YUNG's Better Strongholds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds) - A complete redesign of Minecraft's strongholds!
- [**YUNG's Better Witch Huts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts) - Adds overhauled witch huts to swamps!
- [**YUNG's Bridges**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-bridges) - Adds beautiful naturally generated bridges throughout the world!
- [**YUNG's Extras**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-extras) - Extra structures, features, and vanilla+ content suitable for any modpack!
- [**YUNG's Menu Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-menu-tweaks) - A small, lightweight mod that makes browsing menus a lot easier
- [**YetAnotherConfigLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.
- [**Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) - Your options shall be respected.
- [**Zoomify**](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod with infinite customizability.
